resume.summary: Creative and detail-oriented B.Tech student with a passion for social media strategy, content planning, and audience engagement. Experienced in growing online communities and analysing engagement metrics. Seeking a Social Media Internship to contribute fresh ideas and consistent execution.

education.school: Symbiosis Centre for Management Studies, Pune
education.coursework: Relevant Coursework: Integrated Marketing Communication, Market Research, Consumer Psychology, Branding, Digital Analytics

technicalSkills.skillGroup: Instagram, LinkedIn, Twitter/X, YouTube Shorts, Pinterest
Canva, Meta Business Suite, Buffer, Google Analytics, CapCut
Content Calendars, Copywriting, Hashtag Strategy, Community Management
Basic Photoshop, Trend Analysis, Influencer Outreach

experience.title: Social Media Intern — Synapse Analytics Pvt. Ltd., Pune

bullets.bullet: Managed content calendar across Instagram and LinkedIn, growing followers by 22% in two months.
Designed 40+ branded posts and reels using Canva, increasing average engagement rate by 18%.
Tracked performance metrics weekly and presented insights to the marketing team.
Grew the college AI & ML Club's Instagram following from 300 to 1,200 in 8 weeks.
Designed a content series that increased average reel views by 3x.
Coordinated with 5 student contributors for consistent posting schedule.
Built a personal LinkedIn presence reaching 50,000+ impressions over 3 months.
Repurposed long-form content into short, high-engagement posts.
Designed a digital awareness campaign that reached 10,000+ people for a local NGO.
Coordinated volunteer-generated content for authentic storytelling.

achievements.achievement: Selected among 80 students college-wide for the Smart India Hackathon (SIH 2024) internal round.
Received the Academic Excellence Award for Semester 2 with the highest GPA (9.3) in the CSE department cohort of 120 students.
Active contributor to two college-wide technical fests, coordinating logistics and technical sessions for 150+ participants.

extracurricular.activity: Core Member, Technical Club, VIT Pune — organised hands-on workshops for 150+ students (2023–Present).
Technical Blogger — published articles on Medium covering tools and best practices relevant to the field; collectively read 4,000+ times.
Volunteer Mentor, CodeForGood (NGO Initiative) — guided 15 high school students through technology fundamentals over an 8-week programme.
